We're pacing a little behind where we need to be to hit our goal before Tuesday's FEC deadline.

**[We wouldn't ask if it weren't important: If you're able to make a financial contribution today, can Elizabeth count on you to be the next grassroots donor from Pennsylvania? Chip in right now, and we'll send you a free "Warren Democrats" sticker to say thank you for stepping up in this critical moment.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852509a/45c30650/1ce831ee4/66e9837c/14101777/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnItc3RrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMyM0ZfRU9RX1NUS19UXzIwMjAwNjI3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr-stk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS23F_EOQ_STK_T_20200627_V1S2_P")**

This movement (literally!) wouldn't exist without grassroots donors chipping in.

People like you all across this country are stepping up to say they want to own a piece of this movement. And the impact has been incredible already. In the past few months, candidates we've endorsed have won across the country. And we got to celebrate great victories this week, with more on the way as absentee ballots are counted.

And with more primaries coming up in the next couple of weeks, it's powerfully important we hit our fundraising goals. It's what powers our outreach and get-out-the-vote efforts.

**[If you're in a place where making a financial contribution makes sense, please chip in $2 or anything you can right now to power the work we're doing together-- we'll send you a free "Warren Democrats" sticker as a thank you for stepping up during this crucial moment.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852509a/45c30650/1ce831ee4/66e9837c/14101777/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnItc3RrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMyM0ZfRU9RX1NUS19UXzIwMjAwNjI3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr-stk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS23F_EOQ_STK_T_20200627_V1S2_P")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Nehls is weak on sex trafficking and “doesn’t have time” to respond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Troy Nehls turned a blind eye to a sex-trafficking victim in Fort Bend | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0e5faa97a374/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12559458?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: KathaleenWall.com** Saturday, June 27, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Slams Weak-On-Sex-Trafficking Troy Nehls For Saying He "Doesn't Have Time" To Respond To Criticism Of His Record**

_Sugar Land Republican Kathaleen Wall Says: "Man Up, Troy Nehls. If Texans Can't Count On You To Stand Up To Violent Sex Traffickers, How Can We Expect You To Stand Up To Nancy Pelosi And The Liberals In Washington?" _
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate Kathaleen Wall (TX-22) today slammed Troy Nehls for running from criticism he’s turned a blind eye to sex trafficking in his own backyard.

>From the Twitter account of Texas Tribune reporter Patrick Svitek:

_“In forum, Nehls doesn't directly address Wall ad but says she's "spreading lies" b/c she's losing & he doesn't haven't time/energy/resources to respond every time. "I have a wife & 3 children — the families of Fort Bend ... CD 22 will be a priority for me when I serve you in" DC.”_
[https://twitter.com/PatrickSvitek/status/1276959968340725761?s=20](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=f5f6da2420&e=01c99b7fbd)

“Man up, Troy Nehls. If Texans can’t count on you to stand up to violent sex traffickers, how can we expect you to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and the liberals in Washington?” asked Wall. “We’ve seen how you let down innocent women like Courtney Litvak and we’re not going to allow you to let down almost a million people as a Member of Congress.”

Yesterday Wall released a devastating TV:60 for Houston broadcast television titled “Courtney’s Story,” telling the brave story of sex trafficking survivor Courtney Litvak and her loving parents, which Troy Nehls turned a blind eye to as Sheriff of Fort Bend County.

“To young women like Courtney and their families, here are my commitments to you,” continued Wall. “I will spend each and every day in Washington protecting all life, and I will not stop until the scourge of sex trafficking is eliminated from our communities, no matter what weak and ineffectual bureaucrats like Troy Nehls try to tell us.”

Below please find the script for “Courtney’s Story,” and the YouTube link here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5F4yT-gpl78](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=bd8b26f321&e=01c99b7fbd)
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=19336ea760&e=01c99b7fbd)
**Courtney Litvak: **I was 17 and I was drawn into the life of sex trafficking as a minor.

**Kelly Litvak:** When we went to sit down with Sheriff Troy Nehls for a two-hour meeting... I felt so confident that he was going to immediately sound the alarms...

But instead, Sheriff Troy Nehls has ...publicly blamed and shamed our family.

**Alan Litvak** : Sheriff Troy Nehls, knows what's going on in his county... and has the gall to re-victimize a young lady, a mom, a dad, who have been through hell.

That's not serving the public, that's harming the public.

We don't need people like Troy Nehls in Fort Bend County, or Washington, DC.

And I’d love to look you in the eye and have you tell me how you can possibly sit there and not do your job and not protect my family – because that’s what you’ve done for years.

**Kathaleen Wall** : I’m Kathaleen Wall and I approve this message.

###
---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: URGENT: Our final deadline before voting starts
body:
The end of June marks our final quarterly fundraising deadline before our primary.
Peter,The end of June marks our final quarterly fundraising deadline before our primary.We're just 20 days from early voting. 40 days from the primary election. **And we 're critically behind our fundraising goal. **[**Can you chip-in before our final deadline?**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-r/) [CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-y/) [CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-j/) [CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-t/) [CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-i/) Our campaign has huge momentum heading into the primary. I'm proud to be endorsed by President Donald Trump, the Trump Family, and Senator Tom Cotton. And we have an army of grassroots supporters ready to get-out-the-vote. But we're counting on your help to fund their important efforts. [**Can you chip-in right now?**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-d/) Thank you for your support.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-o/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-b/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptdiutl-fuutjhhtj-n/)

Dear Friend, Great news! The Austin Chronicle has reaffirmed my endorsement for the July 14th runoff. Check out all the Chronicle's endorsements [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18046770/215259892/-1167205539?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDQ4ZTc3NC0zZGI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=15W8f_qFMDAQJO512EzVeUBPtGaQgdLuXwiKB_WpN98=&emci=d70ce189-35b9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=d048e774-3db9-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10438639). * The Austin American-Statesman
* The Austin Chronicle
* Texas AFL-CIO
* Central Texas Labor Council - AFL-CIO
* Indivisible TX-17 Bryan College Station
* Wells Branch Democrats
* Pflugerville Area Democrats
* Young Dems BCS
* North by Northwest Democrats
* Liberal Austin Democrats
* University Democrats

Thanks to your support, the runoff campaign is set. The signs have been purchased, data team and digital ads are in place, text and phone campaigns are ongoing. And of course, we've got a steady cadence of virtual town halls on the calendar to be as accessible to voters as possible during the pandemic. But I'm going to ask you to dig deep and chip in to help us hit our end of quarter goal. We're raising now to build the resources we need to take on the eventual Republican nominee. With only 111 days between the runoff and the general election, we have to hit the ground running on July 15th. clean_body: Hey Friend, Did you catch Nancy Pelosi’s email yesterday? As the Speaker of the House laid out, in order for Democrats to keep their Majority this fall, we’ll need to make sure that we continue to flip seats in our most competitive districts -- that means our race here in TX-22! But in order to defend our majority and send Sri to Congress, we need to make sure our FEC report is in top shape, friend. Can you donate just $22 to help us meet our goal? If you’re not convinced, take a look at Speaker Pelosi’s email below. Here’s a link to donate. Don’t lose it! = -Matt On Sat, Jun 27, 2020 at 10:38 AM Nancy Pelosi wrote: = | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Friend -- I’m reaching out to you today with a very critical matter. At the end of this month, Sri will be faced with his most important FEC deadline to date, and we desperately need your help to see him through it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Protecting our Majority this fall doesn’t mean just supporting our Democrats who are already in the House, but also continuing the utmost important task of flipping more seats blue. TX-22 is one of our very best pick up opportunities in the entire country, and Sri Kulkarni is a candidate of the highest caliber. His history of serving our country as a Foreign Service Officer and dedication to protecting access to health care, a woman’s right to choice, and our constitution -- are just some of the many reasons why we must bring him to Congress. But make no mistake, friend: Sri is going to need your full support to beat the corporate special interests and win in November. Right now, Sri is just a few days away from his FEC quarter deadline, where he will publicly report his fundraising numbers.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for all you do, Nancy Pelosi | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The runoff is coming up fast, and we need your help.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63aa7/2096872523/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63aa5/2096872523/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=10")
---
Hi there Peter -- **Next Tuesday marks our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline before the runoff,** and we're not exaggerating when we say it's our most important yet.

When our next FEC report is released, it'll clue everyone in to how strong our campaign is heading into the general election. **And experts everywhere will use it to determine our chances of winning in November.** _We know we can win_ \-- but we need to make sure this upcoming report reflects that reality.
**[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION NOW!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63aa5/2096872523/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=10")**
In order to make the most of this final end-of-quarter period before the runoff, **anyone who pitches in before Tuesday 's midnight deadline will have their donation MATCHED -- and we'll mail you a free sticker as thanks!**

**We 've set a goal of bringing 2,000 new* grassroots donors on board before the deadline. Will you make a MATCHED donation to help us reach this crucial goal and prove our campaign has what it takes to take on and BEAT Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 (Becomes $10!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a9b/2096872523/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10 (Becomes $20!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a99/2096872523/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25 (Becomes $50!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a9f/2096872523/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 (Becomes $100!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a9d/2096872523/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a93/2096872523/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__")**
Thanks,
Team MJ

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63aa5/2096872523/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.1nd__1612__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a92/2096872523/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1612&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489019c/7f51f7bc/416830cc/4ef63a90/2096872523/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

And you know what? They might just get away with it. The race for Iowa's 2nd District is one of the closest in the country. It's a blue district that went to Trump in 2016. So this is anyone's race. **[That's why I'm emailing you -- Rita Hart needs to show that she has the strong grassroots support necessary to win. Can you donate $15 to protect one of the most essential races to keeping the House blue? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/VRu5AWyImJaxPYR1YFmUjXVcOizTtoE8CAZ-oCKfQhk=/7eWU3ykJBVMRJ7k3LsRFij-hF9PlXhY7FfxbrKGno9k=?refcode=200628-email)** | ****[CONTRIBUTE $15>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/VRu5AWyImJaxPYR1YFmUjXVcOizTtoE8CAZ-oCKfQhk=/7eWU3ykJBVMRJ7k3LsRFij-hF9PlXhY7FfxbrKGno9k=?refcode=200628-email&amount=15)****

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Sunday inspiration
body:
We’re seeing a change in politics.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381713-899751-5064701-21eb9e864c-30fa5a96ec)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381713-899751-5064700-a69c46fedb-30fa5a96ec) We’re seeing a change in politics.

On Tuesday, Madison Cawthorn, a 24-year old from North Carolina won his Republican primary in opposition to the party establishment.

**Madison didn’t just win, he won by 31%!**

We’re seeing a change that transcends party politics.

Americans want new leaders, new ideas and new faces.

We are tired of giving our local members of Congress another term, because what has it gotten us?

**How has electing the same leaders again and again served us?** Think about that.

I don’t need to answer that question for you. You know the answer.

And you know it’s time for change.

To make American truly great again, we need members of Congress who are loyal to their nation, not just their political party.

We need leaders who heed President George Washington’s words to beware of the **“baneful effects of the spirit of the party.”**

Make no mistake, I am a proud Republican and I’m running to make our country -- **and our party** \-- better in so many ways.

And, I’m asking you to stand by me and give me the honor of serving in Congress.

With just two days remaining in the fundraising quarter, [**help me take back President Trump’s home district and send home a four-term Democrat Congresswoman who has done very little for America**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381713-899751-5064700-a69c46fedb-30fa5a96ec).

Help me get to Washington with Madison Cawthorn and prove to the Establishment that new blood is in the best interests of our nation. Give me the opportunity to FIGHT for you!

[**Donate $10 today to help me hit our fundraising goal by June 30th.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381713-899751-5064700-a69c46fedb-30fa5a96ec)

Thanks again for all that you do, and I hope you had a great weekend.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381713-899751-5064700-a69c46fedb-30fa5a96ec)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | = 51 years ago, the Stonewall Uprising ignited the fight for LGBTQ+ equality. = In the last 51 years, we accomplished marriage equality, we fought Mike Pence’s discriminatory RFRA, and we’ve elected LGBTQ+ representatives in the General Assembly and in cities across our state. But now, all this progress is at stake. This month, Trump reversed health care protections for transgender Americans. Curtis Hill is trying to rob LBGTQ+ parents of their parental rights. And anti-discrimination policies have narrowly escaped conservative SCOTUS judges. One thing is clear: the GOP won't stop attacking the progress we've made. And if we keep Republicans like Trump and Hill in office we risk going back. = Peter, when you give to our =, you help us make calls, expand our vote-by-mail operation, and get Democrats to the polls in November. = We can’t let 51 years of fighting be in vain. name: Team Warner
subject: 128 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Let's talk about voting.

We're 128 days (just 18 weeks!) away from Tuesday, November 3, 2020 -- Election Day.

It's time to get serious about upping voter turnout. We're facing unprecedented challenges around making sure Virginians are able to safely cast their ballots.

**We broke records in Virginia on Super Tuesday for the Presidential Primary -- now, we need to get that momentum back.**

We're on the heels of a pandemic, and Team Warner knows that many Virginia voters are thinking about how to keep themselves and their families safe when figuring out how to vote. Thankfully, here in the Commonwealth, we have options.

Thanks to the strides our General Assembly has made to increase ballot access, Virginians can:
* Vote by mail if they request an absentee ballot
* Vote early in-person at polling locations
* Vote in-person on Election Day

**[If you have the means, will you consider chipping in to support our voter turnout efforts?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d417/53d9897e/545e3a16/1c8849ad/1466015218/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterreg?refcode=20200628_f_1_nd__632__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")**

Making monumental changes is going to take a monumental effort. The General Assembly is making it easy for Virginians to vote however they choose -- using a mail-in ballot, voting early, or voting on Election Day. **It 's our job to get them to the ballot box.**

No matter how folks feel safest voting this November, we all need to do our part to make sure they turn out.

**[Are you in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d417/53d9897e/545e3a16/1c8849ac/1466015218/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterreg?refcode=20200628_f_1_nd__632__&refcode2=ask2&amount=10")**

Thanks for your support!

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d417/53d9897e/545e3a16/1c8849ab/1466015218/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterreg?refcode=20200628_f_1_nd__632__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")

Williamsburg, VA 23185

body:
It’s the most important reporting deadline for any campaign — ours included. Reporters, organizations, and folks from Washington to Lexington will want to see how much money we raised and how much cash on hand we have.

---
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054129/215399495/11263012?refcode=20200628_em_fr_eoq4_all_hdr_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FhZWNjZC03MmI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l6K59udc00yq266Afr9cXkEEl35dPrzyFNZdl2b892c=)

| Friends — The next few days are some of the _most important fundraising days of the entire cycle_ for campaigns like ours. **_[So, if you’re able, we hope you can make your first contribution to our campaign before Tuesday night at midnight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054131/215399497/11263012?refcode=20200628_em_fr_eoq4_non_l1_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FhZWNjZC03MmI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l6K59udc00yq266Afr9cXkEEl35dPrzyFNZdl2b892c=)._** **(And if you’re supporting other candidates, consider making a donation to them too.)** Here’s why making a donation right now is so important: **On Tuesday at 11:59pm ET,** we’ll close the books on the second quarter of the year. **Then** , our finance team will pull together all of our contributions from the last three months and submit a report to the Federal Elections Commission. **On July 15** , those numbers will be published and public for everyone to see. **It’s the most important reporting deadline for any campaign — ours included.** Reporters, organizations, and folks from Washington to Lexington will want to see how much money we raised and how much cash on hand we have. **But the most important thing to us? It’s showing how strong our grassroots support is.** Our campaign has refused corporate PAC donations. Instead, we’re focusing on grassroots donors — everyday people chipping into our campaign because they believe in Josh’s message. **This people-powered strategy has allowed us to run a campaign we can be proud of — and a campaign you can be proud to contribute to.** We’ve still got a few more days left to fundraise, and our team is working incredibly hard to make this our best quarter yet. [_**Can we count on you to make your first contribution to Josh’s campaign right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054133/215399499/11263012?refcode=20200628_em_fr_eoq4_non_l2_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FhZWNjZC03MmI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l6K59udc00yq266Afr9cXkEEl35dPrzyFNZdl2b892c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054138/215399504/1443928952?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=20200628_em_fr_eoq4_ld_abx10_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FhZWNjZC03MmI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l6K59udc00yq266Afr9cXkEEl35dPrzyFNZdl2b892c=)

Reporters, organizations, and folks from Washington to Lexington will want to see how much money we raised and how much cash on hand we have. | = | Friends — The next few days are some of the most important fundraising days of the entire cycle for campaigns like ours. =. (And if you’re supporting other candidates, consider making a donation to them too.) Here’s why making a donation right now is so important: On Tuesday at 11:59pm ET, we’ll close the books on the second quarter of the year. Then , our finance team will pull together all of our contributions from the last three months and submit a report to the Federal Elections Commission. On July 15 , those numbers will be published and public for everyone to see. It’s the most important reporting deadline for any campaign — ours included. Reporters, organizations, and folks from Washington to Lexington will want to see how much money we raised and how much cash on hand we have. But the most important thing to us? It’s showing how strong our grassroots support is. Our campaign has refused corporate PAC donations. Instead, we’re focusing on grassroots donors — everyday people chipping into our campaign because they believe in Josh’s message. This people-powered strategy has allowed us to run a campaign we can be proud of — and a campaign you can be proud to contribute to. We’ve still got a few more days left to fundraise, and our team is working incredibly hard to make this our best quarter yet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you, Team Hicks | * | | = Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to explain why I am supporting Mike Siegel for Congress. [**But if you don’t need any more convincing, and if you’re in a place where you could make a donation right now, he needs our support before his July 14 election. Time is of the essence. Can you chip in to help send Mike Siegel to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054334/215408362/-1283247144?refcode=em062820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Q0ZWZjMi03NWI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnhPhRVn2wS3NLRs8RaEkXxWUh-7ShcW_F42GfIRVy8=)
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054335/215408363/-1283247144?refcode=em062820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Q0ZWZjMi03NWI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnhPhRVn2wS3NLRs8RaEkXxWUh-7ShcW_F42GfIRVy8=)**
Mike has been fighting for equal opportunity and social justice his entire career. After college, he became a public school teacher, teaching third grade and fifth grade, helping young people learn to read and understand the world. He was a union representative in the teachers union and started free after-school and summer programs that for 15 years have served thousands of low-income children and youth. After spending years in the schools, Mike went to law school so he could take his fighting spirit to the courtroom. Mike challenged racist police policies that targeted Hispanic youth and fought against housing discrimination that left Black and Latino Texans out in the cold. When Mike worked as a city attorney for the City of Austin, he took on Texas Governor Abbott, suing to stop a “show-me-your-papers” bill that Texas Republicans passed to threaten Latino and immigrant communities. Mike also co-wrote the paid sick leave policy for the City of Austin — a critical tool we need to combat the coronavirus pandemic today and help working people build security in the long run. We need Mike’s voice and experience in Congress, where he’ll spend every day fighting for Texans, and I can’t wait to get to work by his side. But Mike is running against one of the wealthiest members of Congress, Michael McCaul. McCaul is practically the poster child of a system rigged to benefit the rich and powerful — he’s spent his tenure in office taking corporate checks and casting votes that help him and his buddies get richer and more powerful. [**We don’t have much time to make sure we retire Michael McCaul and send Mike Siegel to Congress. Help bring him to DC so we can fight side by side for health care for all, an economy that works for everyone, and a climate we can pass on to our children and grandchildren.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18054336/215408364/-1283247144?refcode=em062820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Q0ZWZjMi03NWI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnhPhRVn2wS3NLRs8RaEkXxWUh-7ShcW_F42GfIRVy8=) clean_body: Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to explain why I am supporting Mike Siegel for Congress. = = Mike has been fighting for equal opportunity and social justice his entire career. After college, he became a public school teacher, teaching third grade and fifth grade, helping young people learn to read and understand the world. He was a union representative in the teachers union and started free after-school and summer programs that for 15 years have served thousands of low-income children and youth. After spending years in the schools, Mike went to law school so he could take his fighting spirit to the courtroom. Mike challenged racist police policies that targeted Hispanic youth and fought against housing discrimination that left Black and Latino Texans out in the cold. When Mike worked as a city attorney for the City of Austin, he took on Texas Governor Abbott, suing to stop a “show-me-your-papers” bill that Texas Republicans passed to threaten Latino and immigrant communities. Mike also co-wrote the paid sick leave policy for the City of Austin — a critical tool we need to combat the coronavirus pandemic today and help working people build security in the long run. We need Mike’s voice and experience in Congress, where he’ll spend every day fighting for Texans, and I can’t wait to get to work by his side. But Mike is running against one of the wealthiest members of Congress, Michael McCaul. McCaul is practically the poster child of a system rigged to benefit the rich and powerful — he’s spent his tenure in office taking corporate checks and casting votes that help him and his buddies get richer and more powerful. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Team Warren
subject: re: The only way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Elizabeth sent you this note about our FEC fundraising deadline, which is now less than two days away. The amount of money we raise decides how much we can invest in electing Democrats like Elizabeth | | |
---
Elizabeth sent you this note about our FEC fundraising deadline, which is now less than two days away.

The amount of money we raise decides the amount we can invest in electing Democrats like Elizabeth across the country and growing our grassroots movement for big, structural change.

**And we're still not quite where we need to be to hit our goal by Tuesday.

[If you're able to contribute $2 or whatever you can, it would make a real difference. Please chip in to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525097/45c30650/1ce7639bc/66e98f2b/2172379798/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI0Rl9FT1FfS0lDX1RfMjAyMDA2MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS24F_EOQ_KIC_T_20200628_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Wed, Jun 24, 2020
Subject: The only way
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com |
---
There's only one way we're going to win in 2020.

There's only one way we can make the big, structural change we need in 2021 and beyond.

There's only one way we'll be strong enough to root out corruption, level the playing field for working people, and make our country work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.

To make it all happen, we need to keep growing our grassroots movement -- and that comes with the support of grassroots donors like you.

**Our next FEC fundraising deadline is this Tuesday. We have less than a week to hit our goal. After we release our fundraising numbers, the whole world will see how strong our movement is. Let's show them that we're ready to fight and win.

[If you're in a place where making a financial contribution makes sense, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to support our re-election campaign, help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, and fight for the bold reforms that we need as a country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525097/45c30650/1ce7639bc/66e98f2b/2172379798/VEsEAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI0Rl9FT1FfS0lDX1RfMjAyMDA2MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS24F_EOQ_KIC_T_20200628_V1S1_P")**

I'll be the first to say it: the past three months haven't gone the way any of us planned. But they've shown how many reasons we have to stay in the fight.

The pandemic revealed all the cracks that working people can slip through. And it shined a light on how our system has failed to protect communities of color in particular.

Righteous protesters all over the country have brought us to a moment of serious soul-searching as a nation -- a moment to grapple with, and root out, systemic anti-Black racism and white supremacy.

It's never been more important to win in 2020, at every level -- from state houses to the White House -- but we can't stop there. After November, we won't be able to put up our feet. We'll need to keep fighting side by side for big, structural change.

And that takes a grassroots movement.

As Warren Democrats, we'll keep fighting so that families can get through this crisis in the short term and build economic security for the long run. We'll keep working to elect Democrats who understand that we need to tackle the problems we face head on, instead of just nibbling around the edges. And we'll lay the groundwork for victories in 2021 and beyond.

**We've got a plan to get this done -- but it's only possible with supporters like you, and it starts with hitting our fundraising goal before Tuesday's big FEC deadline.

[If you can, will you make a contribution today? Anything you can chip in would make a real difference -- and it would be a sign that we're all still in the fight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525097/45c30650/1ce7639bc/66e98f2b/2172379798/VEsCDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI0Rl9FT1FfS0lDX1RfMjAyMDA2MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS24F_EOQ_KIC_T_20200628_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525097/45c30650/1ce7639bc/66e98f2b/2172379798/VEsDBQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI0Rl9FT1FfS0lDX1RfMjAyMDA2MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS24F_EOQ_KIC_T_20200628_V1S1_P")
---

name: Senator Maria Cantwell
subject: State leadership matters so much right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Jay's a national leader on the COVID-19 response -- and he needs our help.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, These last few months have driven home the importance of governors. Across the country, state leaders have stepped up to lead the fight against COVID-19, especially when national leadership has been lacking. Here in Washington, Governor Jay Inslee has repeatedly been praised as an example of measured science-driven leadership, while Trump has embraced chaos and petty name-calling. Stepping up to lead is nothing new for Governor Inslee. Since Trump was elected, Jay has repeatedly pushed back against the administration's misguided and discriminatory policies. And he's been a national leader in the fight to protect our environment for future generations. All this while President Trump has hurled insults at him time and time again on Twitter and on TV -- and Republicans are falling in line behind him. **Jay is one of only four governorships Democrats are defending this year, and the Republican Governors Association has more than $53 million to spend to flip this seat.** **[We need to do everything we can to keep Jay in office. Make a donation of $5 or more right now to support Jay Inslee's reelection as governor of Washington.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9270?t=5&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9337?t=6&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9272?t=7&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9277?t=8&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9273?t=9&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9274?t=10&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9270?t=11&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)
---
Jay has long been a national leader in the fight against the climate crisis. He's proven time and time again in Washington state that what works here can and should work anywhere -- from increasing investment in clean energy to eliminating coal-fired power plants. He knows that to make a big impact we need to take big steps.
Now, he's turned that same energy toward protecting Washingtonians from the effects of COVID-19. During these chaotic and uncertain times, Governor Inslee has set a national example of thoughtful, steady leadership -- a sharp contrast to the mess in the other Washington.
But while Governor Inslee is focused on protecting Washington, he must still stand for reelection this fall. There has never been a time when strong, thoughtful leadership is more necessary than right now, and it is critical Governor Inslee has the resources he needs to win reelection.
**[Support a national leader by supporting Jay Inslee's campaign for reelection as governor of Washington: Donate $5 or more right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9270?t=12&akid=8082%2E868730%2E8vOWN0)**
Thank you,
Maria Cantwell

body:

name: MJ Hegar Senior Staff
subject: making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Get your Team MJ sticker today!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b13/3787567317/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Just making sure you saw this, Peter.

Next Tuesday marks our final end-of-quarter deadline before the runoff, and it's no joke when we say it's our most important yet. **When the next FEC reports come out, everyone will use them to determine our chances of winning in November.** _We_ know we can beat Sen. Cornyn -- but we have to make sure everyone else knows that, too.

**[Read the email below and then make a MATCHED donation to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal. We'll send you a sticker in the mail as thanks!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b12/3787567317/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ Hegar Senior Staff
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar HQ**
Subject: Get your Team MJ sticker now!

> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b12/3787567317/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=10")
> ---
> Hi there team -- **Next Tuesday marks our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline before the runoff,** and we're not exaggerating when we say it's our most important yet.
>
> When our next FEC report is released, it'll clue everyone in to how strong our campaign is heading into the general election. **And experts everywhere will use it to determine our chances of winning in November.** _We know we can win_ \-- but we need to make sure this upcoming report reflects that reality.
> **[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION NOW!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b12/3787567317/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=10")**
> In order to make the most of this final end-of-quarter period before the runoff, **anyone who pitches in before Tuesday 's midnight deadline will have their donation MATCHED -- and we'll mail you a free sticker as thanks!**
>
> **We 've set a goal of bringing 2,000 new* grassroots donors on board before the deadline. Will you make a MATCHED donation to help us reach this crucial goal and prove our campaign has what it takes to take on and BEAT Sen. Cornyn?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5 (Becomes $10!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b11/3787567317/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10 (Becomes $20!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b10/3787567317/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25 (Becomes $50!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b17/3787567317/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50 (Becomes $100!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b16/3787567317/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b15/3787567317/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__")**
> Thanks,
> Team MJ
>
>
> _*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._
>
>
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b12/3787567317/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-june-eoq?refcode=email_20200628.2nd__1608__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b14/3787567317/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2MDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1608&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890199/7f51f7bc/416ac99f/4ef63b0b/3787567317/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: I know Eugene is up to the task
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
We need leaders who can rise to the occasion and tackle the tough issues that lie ahead. I know Eugene is up to the task, but he needs all of us backing him in order to win this November.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Friend,

I ran for President because I believe that change is something worth fighting for, but that goes far beyond the White House. We must also protect and expand our Democratic House Majority, and one of the best opportunities to do that is with Eugene DePasquale in Pennsylvania’s 10th district.

**We need leaders who can rise to the occasion and tackle the tough issues that lie ahead. I know Eugene is up to the task, but he needs all of us backing him in order to win this November.**

Friends -- here’s a quick Sunday update from Team Gómez HQ:

Tuesday night is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. As a quick reminder, this deadline is especially important because it’s the first one in our General Election matchup against our self-funding opponent.

**[We’re hoping to send a message of grassroots strength but we need to raise another $2,351 before midnight tonight to stay on track. Can you send a donation to Georgette’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18055409/215443103/1147193815?refcode=em-200628-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzU1OGNhZi04NGI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cPFHA5tz7K4EGDEk5OqWTINg6KzPnlIts-RRsBBx88A=)**
_**FEC DEADLINE: Donate Today!**_ [Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200628-all-a) We’re gearing up for what promises to be one of the most expensive races in the country: **-** **On one side, you’ve got Sara Jacobs who has self-funded two congressional runs in different districts to the tune of millions.** She lost the primary in CA-49 in 2018. Now she’s spending big money to try and buy this district.

**\- And one the other hand, you’ve got City Council President Georgette Gómez --** a community organizer who worked to improve this district her entire life. In her first City Council race she was outspent 3-to-1, but the power of the people won. Now, she’s fighting to be our next congressional member. **[Cash is not everything, but you pitching in demonstrates that this seat will not be bought. Chip in now to help us build a strong, people-powered movement>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18055410/215443104/1147193815?refcode=em-200628-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzU1OGNhZi04NGI5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cPFHA5tz7K4EGDEk5OqWTINg6KzPnlIts-RRsBBx88A=)**

Thanks for your support,

Alex Obolensky
Deputy Campaign Manager

**_Maybe she meant George Floyd, but I think we can agree that she and Biden are not playing with a full deck!_**

I'm still $34,120 short. I need your help- time is running out!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=inca2of2wpNxmng&b=4LDkUQ4UNYQlZRVteZqIpw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=inca2of2wpNxmng&b=4LDkUQ4UNYQlZRVteZqIpw). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

name: Bill Olson
subject: What do radical Democrats want?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

The rage and violence being committed by the Democrats right now is something unusual to behold- both scary and threatening to our country.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

At first, the radical Leftists seemed to want to erase any traces of Confederate history.

In the former Confederate capitol, Richmond, VA, three statues -- those of Confederate Gen. Williams Carter Wickham, Confederate President Jefferson Davis and Christopher Columbus -- were torn down over a five-day span in June.

The statue of Columbus was thrown into a lake.

At first, they said it was about racism. But then it became a round condemnation of all of history, and a statement of treason against anything American!

The statue of George Washington that sits at Northeast 57th and Sandy Boulevard was toppled and spray painted on Thursday night.

Phrases like "White fragility" and "Big Floyd" were written on it with spray paint. Adam Johnson lives in the neighborhood and says the statue was always part of the community, but maybe it should not be anymore.

"Maybe it's time for George Washington to go to a museum or go somewhere else," Johnson said.

These people don't want to do away with Confederate statues. THEY WANT TO DO AWAY WITH AMERICA!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

Part of their plan to do away with America is to get rid of the rule of law. Our country was founded on "Equal Justice Under Law".

That's why the radical Democrats have been so keen to get rid of our police. After all, without law enforcement, there can be no laws:

Police responded to a second shooting in Seattle’s “autonomous zone” that occurred late Sunday night, the second shooting inside the zone in just two days.

The victim of the shooting was transported to Harborview Medical Center and is in serious condition, according to the Seattle Police Department.

The shooting occurred in the city’s “Capitol Hill Occupied Protest” zone, or CHOP, an area of several blocks in the city’s downtown Capitol Hill neighborhood. Protesters drove police from the area last week and have continued to occupy the vacated precinct.

The protests began as a wave of unrest erupted across the country in response to the death of George Floyd, a black man who died in Minneapolis police custody after a white officer knelt on his neck for nearly nine minutes.

Sunday’s shooting comes after another shooting inside the zone early Saturday morning, during which a 19-year-old man was killed and a 33-year-old man critically injured. The suspects in that shooting, who fled the scene, have not been arrested, Detective Mark Jamieson said.

Without laws, there can be no liberty.

But what the radical Left- this "new" Democrat party- wants is NOT freedom, NOR liberty.

What they want is chaos, destruction, and murder.

After all, isn't that what they have given us so far? They have shown us what they want by doing it already! Over 100 murdered by rioters, including dozens of cops. Hundreds more cops hospitalized with severe injuries.

They with to take away your freedom and replace it with a Communist dictatorship.

These people are nuts! I consider this a grave failure of our education system that so many of our young people have been deluded and indoctrinated this way.

I tell you what, if you're in one of these cities, buy your guns now! Because your safety is in danger with Democrat leadership like this.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

Are you angry yet? Are you concerned for your fellow citizens who want to be safe?

What's crazy is that the VERY SAME Democrats who just a moment ago wanted to take your guns away because "you have the police", ALSO now want to take away the police!

I stand with the brave police and first responders! I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

I support BOTH the Second Amendment AND the police. I support the rule of law and equal justice under law- and that makes me the Dems' worst nightmare!

I am not a career politician. I'm a career soldier who wants to defend our country against all enemies- foreign and domestic.

That's why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more guns, more safety- and less radical, destructive liberal Democrats like Darren Soto. They want to destroy America- and the only thing in the way of that is US.

Will you join this fight with me? I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA
I have a big fundraising deadline next week- and I'm still about $40,000

short of my goal. I need you to help me reach my goal!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gnbadu331_6OuRU&b=LECtKHKkWc9OpZDOL5FMpA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

subject: I have no choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
At midnight on June 30, we will officially close the books on our FEC fundraising goal. This is a _firm_ deadline. There won’t be time to make up for “missed goals” or any “extended deadlines” to get us back on track. Our numbers will be locked in, sent to the Federal Election Commission, and they will become public. **No second chances. No do-overs.** That’s why my team and I have decided to set a goal of 25,000 grassroots donors to our campaign before the clock runs out — and we need to hit our target if we want to report the strongest numbers possible. We have no choice but to blow this FEC report out of the water. With less than five months to go before Election Day, it’s go-time. Can you help? **I’m asking you to donate any amount meaningful to you toward our FEC quarterly goal right now. Every penny matters in a state that could hand Donald Trump a second term in the White House. Every. Single. clean_body: | At midnight on June 30, we will officially close the books on our FEC fundraising goal. This is a firm deadline. There won’t be time to make up for “missed goals” or any “extended deadlines” to get us back on track. Our numbers will be locked in, sent to the Federal Election Commission, and they will become public. No second chances. No do-overs. That’s why my team and I have decided to set a goal of 25,000 grassroots donors to our campaign before the clock runs out — and we need to hit our target if we want to report the strongest numbers possible. We have no choice but to blow this FEC report out of the water. With less than five months to go before Election Day, it’s go-time. Can you help? I’m asking you to donate any amount meaningful to you toward our FEC quarterly goal right now. Every penny matters in a state that could hand Donald Trump a second term in the White House. Every. Single. Penny. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Donald Trump and his allies will be looking for any vulnerabilities in our campaign operations once this report is made public. We can’t let them find one. Thank you. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota To receive exclusive campaign updates, text TINA to 30311 and subscribe to our texts! Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: John Lewis
subject: Joe has marched. Joe has spoken out. Joe has led.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee735/3522516331/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Friends, We are experiencing profound national crises on multiple fronts. From the protests demanding an end to racial oppression and dramatic changes to our policing system, to an economic recession and more, _Joe Kennedy offers our country the powerful moral leadership we need to get through this._ [**So I 'm personally asking: Will you join me in supporting Joe with a small $3 or $10 donation to send him to the Senate before his critical End-of-Quarter deadline in 4 days? **](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL-&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250") I have fought for civil rights my entire life, and while we have made significant progress, we have miles to go before we sleep. This fight will not end with my generation. Joe has marched. Joe has spoken out. Joe has amplified the voices of Black and brown Americans. Joe has walked side-by-side with me across the Edmund Pettus Bridge. Joe has led. He understands what's at stake, _**and you can take it from me, he will get the job done.**_ **Right now, Joe is up against his biggest test yet: his final End-of-Quarter FEC deadline before the primary.[Will you chip in $3 or $10 before June 30th so Joe has the resources he needs to win on September 1st? ](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL-&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")** In the years that I have known Joe Kennedy I have seen him stand up and fight -- time and again -- for the suffering, the struggling, and the silenced. That's the leadership we need in the Senate. Leadership that won't just accept a return to "normal," but will push us to build a new, better "normal" where healing and justice are delivered to every single person that calls this country home. Joe is a clear voice for justice and dignity in a rising class of public servants -- _and I know he will be a tremendous partner in the Senate to help finally achieve justice for all._ **So what do you say, everyone? [Will you join me in helping to elect Joe Kennedy to the United States Senate? Again, he's facing an important deadline on June 30th, so if you can, please rush a donation to help Joe win. ](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL-&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")** Joe was built for this fight. Let's send him to the frontlines. Yours in solidarity, John Lewis [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee737/3522516331/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=3,10,20,50,100,250,other&amount=3") |
---|---|---

| |
* * *

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee730/3522516331/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee731/3522516331/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee732/3522516331/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because Joe Kennedy is relying on you to help him take his fight for the basic dignity of every American family to the United States Senate. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request only to receive the most important emails [**here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee733/3522516331/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") or you can unsubscribe **[here](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee73c/3522516331/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**. | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
---
Joe Kennedy has dedicated his career to social and economic justice. A former Peace Corps member, legal aid volunteer, and assistant district attorney, Joe is one of the Trump Era's most powerful voices for moral clarity in the Democratic Party. **[Will you help get his voice to the United States Senate by making a contribution today?](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-June2020-FR-Lewis?refcode=E3810-20200626-JohnLewisResend-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SB&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---

| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639068e/55b66746/211626d0/80ee73f/3522516331/VEsHAQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Sunday Recap: Keeping our kids healthy
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the highlights from last week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up to date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018OFOea030_ZoYBIMdC2ceVmVT8NNffTVO9ViQUB__SxsGEkihm7WPz2WYhybxJyGZO8DfviKkUaUKooaGT7_6Oxz-dnlA_wR0RKgnd-vGNKhv4zPYSoRB09I2XFJByOnYMeNWAeYFzAG-Y9JEf0Th6GYKDGekqZE1By_gvkUr-Wba0kjc-lh8hmozocykEXU1n5odr5xjVjeKfn8QoqVXroaq0Fsgjn24lvKoOUbjptzdwd3NTx7yOLPEnw7vfx_xNSxutxe1FWEh58kinQuA-JGFyW2ut8d7itxMqIt31EeK_Ft5a_mBSZiMTh3w8EVmVDr17AKfio=&c=QUfES1Qpl19NY5jbbxkoFQbx2rj4mLhhrSth5pf-UDaIGLIcASMOCg==&ch=B3gUmZldsdEpvKmRVMWb1C8BKx8c4zMXGqDHZvARQS_ACzUE0jViVQ==). The better we stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
VACCINATIONS

We are behind in immunizations, and we need to catch up. If your child is under 2 years old, or age 4, 11 or 16, and needs a vaccine, or if they have missed a child well visit or lead screen during the last several months, please call their doctor and make an appointment to be seen before your child returns to school in September.
If you or your child are currently uninsured, you can reach out to our health insurance exchange, at 1-855-840-4774 to learn more about coverage available to your child. I'm proud of our exchange, and I'm going to do everything in my power to protect and expand access to coverage.
| | |
---|---
|
BEACHES

This weekend we're going to increase parking at our state beaches to 75% capacity, which will immediately add more than 2,200 additional parking spaces. We also want to encourage visitors to buy beach passes online so you can enter through express lane at most beaches. This will cut down on in-person interactions, reduce traffic backups and cut down on tie-ups at parking entrances. Go to [www.beachparkingRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018OFOea030_ZoYBIMdC2ceVmVT8NNffTVO9ViQUB__SxsGEkihm7WP2i1_Bk6fn8FNfPLWgTJIpapL--tWLYsb0iugY09aHwF1Je5Ssjt5lak5VtssVfConq5eLYPQ7GZWCWcDPYkhXnrT4wDVdU0LwW6KAKfunETclQMb6nKk2fvY0fa4Xvm2bODMyO6d63uplLXiyRy7hg9XfRpURFQT3qyaovPBdS30V88S1FydZG1_SFRQLrrRH18zqxFGwwaBjJChgsGgrGx4wfZD65aLqd-lm7bJtje2M3q7wMvPh5g8Ke3Jarf0VxPoE-_OmWXExnuG58c8u5Rac2GWGRzGESj-8ekIuwRpd2m_ahNso8XBUo0_6MlrRHQErGi3I7LuGO3dQD45zrqSxmsmhatj_2jcsqFD9sVeXWySVSbHxC6DqMFVVl-xSdjd-3Ik78EekQ32lh9EBwRKnDUkMhboa0ikcoJeJMoKz8105mk-HQ=&c=QUfES1Qpl19NY5jbbxkoFQbx2rj4mLhhrSth5pf-UDaIGLIcASMOCg==&ch=B3gUmZldsdEpvKmRVMWb1C8BKx8c4zMXGqDHZvARQS_ACzUE0jViVQ==) to buy a season pass or a daily flex pass. Also, in an effort to reduce lines, we're no longer going to be selling season passes at beach entrances. Those transactions take several minutes longer than daily passes, and so we're encouraging everyone to go to go online to purchase season passes.

We're also launching a new tool so you can check to see whether beach parking lots are full online before taking a drive to the beach. You can go to [www.riparks.com/beachpass](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018OFOea030_ZoYBIMdC2ceVmVT8NNffTVO9ViQUB__SxsGEkihm7WP2i1_Bk6fn8FD_sUTbvQLf2fa96nvReXk8xsS7sFtA80Sjym4Ik6N0L5Egi-yb32AbQqFT9zN50OjVYrbBc8e-rcuuq7oHjj4N96UMe7Q9GtY3FmLTYIOgaQaPDnkBwxeG5mUIM219R84EbdZDxEMSMIaVxPjcGPhC6_1jjhb3jdkKHSVCjenBG7_vNRMrK7HWMti6G3-Y_qwSktqABJGvzTZoFbyFNRwKyQ748EN2Kd9Mji5EjK44ju8drNY9pHJbjHSlmaXKBH6CUV8vpvm2CDMddH2nR__cEgX6PdYGXKCO2rGbp10b5G8lQQtmPnnnbQbwaXGrkYChzYHT9TOVBFptmZW2O40z_HvG094mnG4bXDbkwVL1PThTH20-xNL7BhCnO0DAWXFp0TV7S_F-lsiTe7qWPGrLVCq99uvnRFi4AU5B7Cepk=&c=QUfES1Qpl19NY5jbbxkoFQbx2rj4mLhhrSth5pf-UDaIGLIcASMOCg==&ch=B3gUmZldsdEpvKmRVMWb1C8BKx8c4zMXGqDHZvARQS_ACzUE0jViVQ==) to check on parking lot status, and then plan accordingly. I hope you find it helpful!
| | |
---|---
|
SPORTS

In Phase 3, we're going to be allowing no-contact and low-contact sports games to be played between stable groups with no limit on overall group size. Having a stable group means you have the same players and coaches together over the course of the summer. No-contact and low-contact sports include things like baseball, softball, tennis and golf. Games can be played between teams within Rhode Island as well as outside of Rhode Island, provided that there isn't a stay-at-home order or other travel restrictions in that state.
We are still strongly discouraging close contact sport games like basketball, football and soccer. Youth playing these sports should stick to practices, drills, and scrimmages.

In Phase 3, we'll also be allowing spectators at games. We recommend no more than 2 spectators per player, and spectators will be required to wear masks. We'll still be encouraging players to wear masks when practical, but masks are not required to be worn when players are engaged in active play within a stable group or are maintaining 6 feet of distance.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this week Monday and Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018OFOea030_ZoYBIMdC2ceVmVT8NNffTVO9ViQUB__SxsGEkihm7WPz2WYhybxJyGN6kxOrRQp_Yj2luNO-7a_BBI5JfbFm76C5Hhx3Lr3Eguhdp2fKr2u2iKG9njpnujYJ6jd3KX2De8I4EWFfV3YAPWZTCnyXF3flNpkY7TwbeRL2-I9BEgZFDUPMOOnIKbumVRBPzs0BIgPjGyiFcIQPNospAGI1wuhYTpYRIZhwKlnfJX_EdeGjd3Xlo6sP34MzvUvf_O7lduXIv4lSWErhfijQqWmhV1RtUHuzsKLq3uBG402vnRPCW85uiJv3KLW9WW2G2rxwNhFPJLEZRHcfBC6PIw0oXRGCUnx5f1nmdl79oTkOsQCf7nf8s94UUDv7cCEJ8SzNCM5P1t1-LC58-0pU7e3ziB0g7lAwRlVg_exjuK08w8XNMhyYrTu2iu&c=QUfES1Qpl19NY5jbbxkoFQbx2rj4mLhhrSth5pf-UDaIGLIcASMOCg==&ch=B3gUmZldsdEpvKmRVMWb1C8BKx8c4zMXGqDHZvARQS_ACzUE0jViVQ==).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leah=20Garrett?=
subject: Introducing Our New Campaign Manager
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c29c1b2390&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **Please Welcome
Leah Garrett to the Campaign!**
---
|
---
| Hi Friend!

My name is Leah Garrett, and I’m excited to introduce myself as Pat’s new campaign manager. Pat’s campaign is showing real momentum after the primary. I’m ready to lead the effort to build on the energy you have created in order for this campaign to defeat Jackie Walorski in November.

The 2nd District needs a formidable leader who consistently shows up, is prepared, understands your concerns, and works to improve the quality of life for you and all Hoosiers.

That’s why I believe Pat needs to be the next member of Congress for Indiana-02. Her nearly forty years of service in this district as attorney, teacher, and small business owner uniquely prepare her for this role. I look forward to serving you, the voters of this district, as Pat’s campaign manager to make sure every voter in this district hears Pat’s message of Dignity and Justice for All.
---
| [STAND WITH ME →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=19b6743e29&e=5886ca081d "STAND WITH ME →")
---
| **About Me**

Prior to joining Pat’s campaign, I worked on Amy Klobuchar’s presidential campaign in both New Hampshire and Arkansas leading teams of staffers and volunteers to build the on-the-ground campaign structure, organize events with Amy, and conduct voter outreach. In 2018, I was a Regional Field Director for the Virginia Democratic Party, where I oversaw field efforts in 27 counties.

I also attended the George Washington University’s Graduate School of Political Management where I received a Master’s in Political Management and Electoral Politics.

The main lesson I’ve learned throughout my experience in politics is that it’s critical to understand why people care about their community and why they participate in democracy.

[**June 30th is the all important end of quarter deadline where numbers raised will be noted by national organizations watching this race since winning the primary. Please consider making an investment right now to send the message that this is a people-powered campaign. Anything you’re able to give helps tremendously.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c0d514cdaf&e=5886ca081d)
---
| [INVEST NOW →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a3ad17c96a&e=5886ca081d "INVEST NOW →")
---
| [INVEST $25 IMMEDIATELY →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=cf2838502c&e=5886ca081d "INVEST $25 IMMEDIATELY →")
---
| I’m excited to get to know you during this campaign. If you have any questions, please feel free to reply to this email.

In solidarity,

Leah Garrett
_Campaign Manager_
---
|
---
|
