name: Megan West
subject: You’re Invited - a conversation with Pastor Vance Pitman
body:
| | RSVP and mark your calendar!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=1)
| Peter, What does it look like to faithfully follow Jesus? Please join me for a LIVE conversation with Pastor Vance Pitman, author and Senior Pastor of Hope Church Las Vegas, **[on Tuesday, June 30, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=2)** as we discuss this vital question. We live in a cultural moment that is dependent on how Christians answer this question...which leads to the difference between either being burdened to practice a religion or the freedom to pursue the promise of Jesus for every one of His followers. Pastor Vance brings a unique perspective leading a multicultural fellowship of over 4000 representing 45 languages, planting over 50 churches in the western US, and sending out people to bring the Gospel worldwide. If you’ve got a question you’d like me to ask Pastor Vance, please submit it here and I’ll do my best to ask it during our conversation. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=3) We’ll also talk about the challenges of leading a church through a pandemic, why he wrote his latest book _UNBURDENED: Stop Living for Jesus So Jesus Can Live Through You,_ and his advice on how to approach this election as a follower of Jesus. [RSVP below](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=4) and mark your calendar for this Tuesday, June 30, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT to watch on Facebook and YouTube. I hope you’ll join us! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=5) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=6)
---
* * *

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200628com01&n=7)

name: Eric Trump
subject: My father needs your support

name: Team Christy
subject: 4 reasons to flip CA-25 blue:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Garcia has been a disaster just his first six weeks in Congress. And we'll explain why. **[But if you don't need convincing, you can pitch in $5 or more here to help hit our end-of-quarter goal and send him packing.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd40/3056224729/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non")**
Here's the truth about Mike Garcia:

**On Thursday, he voted against the Justice in Policing Act.** Instead of taking simple steps to stop police violence and defend Black lives in this country, Garcia voted for no change to a system that is horribly broken.

**He wants to take away reproductive rights.** One of his _very first acts_ as a member of Congress was to join in on far-right-wingers' attempts to force a vote on extreme anti-choice legislation. Then he co-sponsored a radical bill that would _ban abortion_ and some types of birth control.

**He doesn 't believe in sensible gun control measures.** The gun violence epidemic in our country is horrifying. We know there are ways to stop the senseless deaths. But Mike Garcia won't vote for commonsense reforms to protect kids at school, worshipers at prayer, or movie-goers in a theater.

**He 's ready to vote to end the Affordable Care Act.** He simply doesn't believe health care is a human right. But Christy has seen firsthand how hard it is when families can't afford care -- even though her mom worked as a nurse for years, she couldn't afford the insulin she needed to stay healthy. That's not a situation any American should have to face.

**The list goes on.**

If Democrats are going to continue working to protect Black lives and end police brutality, expand the ACA, pass gun reform, protect the right to choose, and so much more, we have to flip this key "toss-up" seat -- because the path to the majority runs through CA-25.

**[Your contribution ahead of Tuesday's all-important fundraising deadline could make or break this toss-up race. Chip in $5 or more right now to send Mike Garcia packing and elect a representative Californians can count on.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd40/3056224729/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd41/3056224729/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd42/3056224729/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd43/3056224729/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd5c/3056224729/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd5d/3056224729/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd40/3056224729/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non")

Thanks,

Team Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd40/3056224729/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba37/29776869/9d3fc48/569edd40/3056224729/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjhfZW9xM25vbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200628_eoq3non")

subject: ICYMI: Nehls running from criticism he’s turned a blind eye to sex trafficking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Troy Nehls weak on sex-trafficking and "doesn't have time" to respond | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b22ac6dc15b/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12559470?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: KathaleenWall.com** Sunday, June 28, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Slams Weak-On-Sex-Trafficking Troy Nehls For Saying He "Doesn't Have Time" To Respond To Criticism Of His Record**

_Sugar Land Republican Kathaleen Wall Says: "Man Up, Troy Nehls. If Texans Can't Count On You To Stand Up To Violent Sex Traffickers, How Can We Expect You To Stand Up To Nancy Pelosi And The Liberals In Washington?" _
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate Kathaleen Wall (TX-22) today slammed Troy Nehls for running from criticism he’s turned a blind eye to sex trafficking in his own backyard.

>From the Twitter account of Texas Tribune reporter Patrick Svitek:

_“In forum, Nehls doesn't directly address Wall ad but says she's "spreading lies" b/c she's losing & he doesn't haven't time/energy/resources to respond every time. "I have a wife & 3 children — the families of Fort Bend ... CD 22 will be a priority for me when I serve you in" DC.”_
[https://twitter.com/PatrickSvitek/status/1276959968340725761?s=20](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=89666511f9&e=01c99b7fbd)

“Man up, Troy Nehls. If Texans can’t count on you to stand up to violent sex traffickers, how can we expect you to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and the liberals in Washington?” asked Wall. “We’ve seen how you let down innocent women like Courtney Litvak and we’re not going to allow you to let down almost a million people as a Member of Congress.”

Yesterday Wall released a devastating TV:60 for Houston broadcast television titled “Courtney’s Story,” telling the brave story of sex trafficking survivor Courtney Litvak and her loving parents, which Troy Nehls turned a blind eye to as Sheriff of Fort Bend County.

“To young women like Courtney and their families, here are my commitments to you,” continued Wall. “I will spend each and every day in Washington protecting all life, and I will not stop until the scourge of sex trafficking is eliminated from our communities, no matter what weak and ineffectual bureaucrats like Troy Nehls try to tell us.”

Below please find the script for “Courtney’s Story,” and the YouTube link here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5F4yT-gpl78](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8293a13f81&e=01c99b7fbd)
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=741ff1687a&e=01c99b7fbd)
**Courtney Litvak: **I was 17 and I was drawn into the life of sex trafficking as a minor.

**Kelly Litvak:** When we went to sit down with Sheriff Troy Nehls for a two-hour meeting... I felt so confident that he was going to immediately sound the alarms...

But instead, Sheriff Troy Nehls has ...publicly blamed and shamed our family.

**Alan Litvak** : Sheriff Troy Nehls, knows what's going on in his county... and has the gall to re-victimize a young lady, a mom, a dad, who have been through hell.

That's not serving the public, that's harming the public.

We don't need people like Troy Nehls in Fort Bend County, or Washington, DC.

And I’d love to look you in the eye and have you tell me how you can possibly sit there and not do your job and not protect my family – because that’s what you’ve done for years.

**Kathaleen Wall** : I’m Kathaleen Wall and I approve this message.

###
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=7678f6c78e&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ac5ec430fe&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=c9a31497ba&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ddaa0b15ac&e=01c99b7fbd)

You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=227aff06a3).

Every dollar you give will go directly toward hiring staff, building infrastructure, and organizing Texans to vote for MJ so we can flip the Senate and move our country in the right direction.

If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890165/7f51f7bc/416fff71/4ef63b76/1741198624/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. body:

MARK KELLY (D): 48%
MARTHA MCSALLY (R): 45%
Margin of Error: **2.7%**

**We cannot afford to lose Arizona:** [If you are in a position to, rush in $10 or more to help boost Mark Kelly's chances-> ](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb71f9/4bd7760e/5ec058f1/77a9f793/763486987/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+If+you+are+in+a+position+to+rush+in+ask+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen&source=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen&refcode=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen")

**LAST WEEK:** Donald Trump took the stage in Phoenix, Arizona and in front of thousands attacked Mark Kelly as "WEAK" in an attempt to boost Martha McSally.

**BEFORE THAT:** Mitch McConnell and GOP-aligned dark money groups pledged more than $10 MILLION in ads to help Martha McSally take the lead.

**WHY THIS POLL MATTERS:** This _NBC News/Marist College poll_ has the highest pollster reputation rating and the largest sample size of the Arizona Senate race of ANY poll taken since Mark Kelly has gotten into the race.

**WHAT WE CAN DO:** Mark Kelly is rejecting corporate PAC money in one of the most important battleground races in the nation. We are stepping in to reach out to swing voters, spread Mark's message across the state, and respond to McConnell and Trump's lies.

**YOUR PART:** [If you can, please consider chipping in $10 so we can ensure that Martha McSally does NOT take the lead over famed astronaut and career public servant Mark Kelly.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb71f9/4bd7760e/5ec058f1/77a9f791/763486987/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+If+you+can+please+consider+chipping+in+a&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen&source=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen&refcode=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen")

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb71f9/4bd7760e/5ec058f1/77a9f799/763486987/VEsHBg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen&source=314_EM_FR_200628_3MC-3MO_none_STD_1_AZ-Sen")** to make a donation.

name: Warren Democrats
subject: We'll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We'll get to it: What happens between now and Tuesday is powerfully important -- and every bit counts. If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in before Tuesday's FEC fundraising deadline to... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250ae/45c30650/1ce596e3f/66e98841/2866822648/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Midnight Tuesday is the final fundraising deadline for this quarter's FEC reporting period. After the deadline, we'll publicly report the number of grassroots donations we've received.

**So, we'll get to it: We want these fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible. But right now, we're behind where we want to be to hit our goal.

[What happens between now and Tuesday is powerfully important -- and every bit counts. If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can before Tuesday's FEC fundraising deadline to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250ae/45c30650/1ce596e3f/66e98840/2866822648/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI1Rl9FT1FfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA2MjhfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS25F_EOQ_GRM_D_20200628_V1S3_P")**

We're not going to beat Donald Trump and down-ballot Republicans by backing down -- we'll beat them by fighting back.

We fight back when we build a grassroots movement -- a movement that doesn't take money from fossil fuel giants or corporate lobbyists.

We fight back when we call out corruption in Washington and have Democrats up and down the ballot advocating for working people across the country.

We're asking for your help today to keep powering this fight. Together, we can hit our goal before Tuesday's fundraising deadline and keep growing this grassroots movement.

**[If you can during this time, please make a contribution before Tuesday's FEC fundraising deadline-- we'd be deeply grateful.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250ae/45c30650/1ce596e3f/66e98840/2866822648/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI1Rl9FT1FfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA2MjhfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS25F_EOQ_GRM_D_20200628_V1S3_P")**

Thanks,

Warren Democrats

| | **FWD: 40 days left!**

In case you didn't see our previous email, only **3 more days** until our quarterly deadline! Audrey and I sure hope you can help us finish this campaign strong with a generous contribution today.

-TRM

\--

The **August 4th primary** is just over a month away! Next Tuesday, June 30, is the deadline for contributions for the Second Quarter report. We need your help to deliver our **conservative message** across the Big First district of Kansas.

[Would you be willing to make a generous contribution today?](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=b44efaa9ce&e=a9d1410029) Any amount would help send out mailers, buy 4x8 signs, or get our message on the TV and radio.

Your [contribution](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=b965244225&e=a9d1410029) will help us enter into the final quarter with the momentum needed to win this election and ensure the Big First has conservative representation in Washington, D.C.

**Thank you for your support.** I look forward to seeing you soon.

All my best,
---

name: David Hill
subject: Let's Watch Together!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC
body:
As you know, June 30th is critically important to the future of our district, state, and country. Dear Peter, As you know, June 30th is critically important to the future of our district, state, and country. I want to thank you all for your dedication to Team Hill leading up to these Oklahoma primary elections. Your continued support to our mission and campaign cannot be overstated. After you head out to the polling station to cast your vote, I want to personally invite you to our **David Hill for Congress Primary Election Watch Party!** **As a fundamental supporter of our campaign, I want you to be there to celebrate with us!** | |
---
|
---
Please join us at the **Bank7 Event Center at 7:00 p.m. on Tuesday, June 30th**.

Thank you again for your continued support. I hope to see you on Tuesday night!

Sincerely,

David Hill
PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC

name: Christy Smith
subject: We broke a record. It's not good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede26/1190541899/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full")
Peter,

With Donald Trump and Mike Garcia holding rallies without masks and Senate Republicans stalling passage of the next coronavirus relief package, an outside observer might think that the pandemic is coming to an end.

_They'd be wrong. Dead wrong._

Just this Wednesday, we had a wake up call. California had a record-shattering 7,000+ new cases Wednesday, breaking the old record -- set the day before on Tuesday. The United States saw the highest count of new coronavirus cases ever.

And then we broke the national record AGAIN... on Thursday AND Friday.

**Our leaders are not taking this seriously. Something has to change.**

**[This November, we _have_ to elect a leader who will listen to the science -- not ignore the truth. Donate $5 or more before Christy's end-of-quarter deadline so we can send a pro-science representative to Congress.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede26/1190541899/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full")**

Garcia, Trump, and right-wingers across the country are burying their heads in the sand and putting lives in danger. They're setting a dangerous example to their supporters by downplaying the seriousness of this pandemic.

We can't afford to pretend that the pandemic is over. We can't afford to re-elect politicians who are more concerned about filling the pockets of greedy CEOs than scientific facts. **Lives are at stake.**

**[Rush a donation of $5 or more now to Christy's critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal -- we need real leaders who will listen to the science and save lives, not corporate bank accounts.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede26/1190541899/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede27/1190541899/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede20/1190541899/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede23/1190541899/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba34/29776869/9cf739d/569ede26/1190541899/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjZfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200626_eoq4-full")

Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

It has been another great week for Team Hunt. We are charging full speed into the summer and I am encouraged by the momentum we are generating. Each day brings us one step closer to flipping TX-07 and restoring conservative values to Houston.

On Monday, I joined fellow West Point graduate Captain Cons on Zero Blog Thirty for a great conversation about my time in the Army and my campaign for Congress. There is no doubt that we need more veterans in Congress who have proven their dedication to our country and their ability to work together to get things done. You can catch the full podcast episode [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=055e4f42356f4cbbb630b5bd61682a9e&_e=VJNFI4b6gF7_HQQJICtlY6-4jPhq75v8RvEtkNDxljlIsyOGwZr3Id61pWx4ixOLcMR_4HEz8R7CKzl9JdKUy82kHtVses6smeROYzXgykPmHn2PsJVeK9UHI4DWc8BbbIlMeNnNhiMoXo99F0wLICCGaXuKqqep6r3SzqiVLADGNA5gK0G1x5iW6MgoGQM2UJRpiazl3dLt7QeoxCQfgiO18_lmpNXuYD5P7bkc1ukFggo2KJPLvaQDl-R4CorXWlAOHrRF9j62H0LmBKa1SJ591SoWLeK0oeBYncfvOqzTH80ueod-T_QrrZrnTxn9y9ytrbgg3RyaRm5nVeb1HEfRnEKpYFi3-MOVNeXQQaTHAroC8RYYN_BAbcOzGZFZHRak3kPVYKxhh9pe7c8B-w%3D%3D).

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=055e4f42356f4cbbb630b5bd61682a9e&_e=VJNFI4b6gF7_HQQJICtlY80lnMgH4eML-FQcAJTPf7vdL89Gs1Q_On39fTTTfTmuolU5kAOGYr_VPhNz6Yr4eUkMOUcKa5mmLWm8kobpVYJ52URbaK1f7ArSJujjqZLDjM106mrPm4Yr8n5oGuMsabbaIkBCPav8Me721QGb1vzT6OuHsf1EcGbD3KmcY4FmkHL6jCLxGdqxLOcYfXtr4ai8aYmAUqSh7bkd75-ubDk_B3cEAX6kcPXnUDf1waguwmydNSf7mDQ7XJmAEG0cNmaqWaUe39GSBYnamYvlk1bFPnDMa7L4xbCbOWuEzML4)

On Tuesday, I was honored to receive Mayor Robert Lord's endorsement. I look forward to collaborating with local leaders like Mayor Lord and giving them the resources they need to ensure that communities like Bunker Hill Village remain a great place to live, work, and raise a family.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=055e4f42356f4cbbb630b5bd61682a9e&_e=VJNFI4b6gF7_HQQJICtlYzfggiruXDSD06IlliMmM_s51Cpw3WdqUGAHq6uUEnZrYLrwAZRhj4fSmkinyuDsqjBM-LQ-HFGJzRKc7x1s3p9N9xTJ-9hvur6cjGv6PAPGW5b5tpsjAhVJKdTxKXH56p6g6wmWBsQn474BEUeAODmKdDIy7atwPgZAi8ftxwOJIgSRiiT7oALYQ-40xH1NxtKtEXFs1lLKNBLNKyhk9gtRM84ziA4gj6cQNaHtrRlfcOx1-GXxdZXHTzlbPuR11G4JCYgz4LBvAQASlkXGcldf6XFIFJX6x2_ly1Y2nAJf)

On Saturday, I joined Fox and Friends to defend our National Anthem and discuss its value as a source of unity during this challenging times. Now, more than ever, it is vital that we come together as a Nation to combat our current health and economic challenges. The National Anthem should be a symbol of unity, not just another way to divide us.

clean_body: Friend, It has been another great week for Team Hunt. We are charging full speed into the summer and I am encouraged by the momentum we are generating. Each day brings us one step closer to flipping TX-07 and restoring conservative values to Houston. On Monday, I joined fellow West Point graduate Captain Cons on Zero Blog Thirty for a great conversation about my time in the Army and my campaign for Congress. There is no doubt that we need more veterans in Congress who have proven their dedication to our country and their ability to work together to get things done. You can catch the full podcast episode . On Tuesday, I was honored to receive Mayor Robert Lord's endorsement. I look forward to collaborating with local leaders like Mayor Lord and giving them the resources they need to ensure that communities like Bunker Hill Village remain a great place to live, work, and raise a family. On Saturday, I joined Fox and Friends to defend our National Anthem and discuss its value as a source of unity during this challenging times. Now, more than ever, it is vital that we come together as a Nation to combat our current health and economic challenges. The National Anthem should be a symbol of unity, not just another way to divide us. Finally, I want to thank each and every volunteer who is helping to support our campaign by phone-banking, putting up yard signs, and offering to host future events.
